title: hieracium levicaule subsp. euroum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. euroum, also known as the small Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. euroum are said to include the reduction of inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Hieracium levicaule subsp. euroum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
